# Tommy Lahitte — tommylahitte.com

> Senior QA Engineer at Epic Games. Maker and tinkerer who bridges art and technology.

## About
Tommy Lahitte is a Senior QA Engineer at Epic Games working on Virtual Production and Unreal Engine. Previously a decade of video programming and projection supervision for international live shows, and media-server technology at VYV.

## Sections
- /tips/ — Unreal Engine QA & debugging tips (editor tricks, debugging workflows, automation)
- /blog/ — Journal with projects, articles, and recommendations
- /feed.xml — RSS feed

## Key Topics
- Unreal Engine debugging and QA workflows
- Functional test automation with Blueprints
- Virtual Production and media servers
- Electronics, film photography, live show technology
